reasoning: Article 25 of GDPR emphasizes data protection by design and by default, which can be mapped to several Kubernetes security practices. Ensuring least privilege access through RBAC aligns with minimizing data exposure. NetworkPolicies with default deny rules help in restricting unnecessary data flow. Encrypting secrets at rest ensures data protection by default. Enabling audit logging helps in monitoring and ensuring compliance with data protection requirements.
title: Article 25 Data protection by design and by default
